name: Water Domain Spells
description:
Water Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Ice Knife, Healing Word, Snilloc's Snowball Swarm, Protection from Poison
Tier 2: Sleet Storm, Wall of Water
Tier 3: Control Water, Watery Sphere
Tier 4: Cone of Cold, Mass Cure Wounds
